name: Ward
description: Modern Python test framework designed with productivity and readability in mind, featuring descriptive test names, rich diffs and parallel execution.

seo.title: Ward — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Ward: Modern Python test framework designed with productivity and readability in mind, featuring descriptive test names, rich diffs and parallel execution.

when_to_use: Expressive Python tests with descriptive test name strings
Rich diff output for fast failure comprehension
Parallel test execution for faster Python CI pipelines

cons: Adopting Ward means leaving pytest's gravity
review.verdict: A cleaner-feeling test framework, but pytest's ecosystem advantage is too large to justify switching.
review.best_for: Solo developers or hobby projects wanting a fresh pytest alternative
review.not_for: Teams relying on pytest plugins for coverage, Django, async, or BDD
